subcodes.title: Words spoken at home of Lady Blomfield, 1911-09-08
subcodes.first_line: I have journeyed by sea and land for the pleasure of seeing you all. I needed a change
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @goodly deeds; actions, @praise of Western values; culture, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
